hero.name: Leszek Pawlak
hero.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
hero.subtitle: Over a decade of experience building modern web applications. Specializing in React, Node.js, and TypeScript.

about.title: About me
about.bio: A seasoned Senior Engineer with over 12 years of experience in web development. I possess a profound understanding and passion for technology, especially in innovative web solutions. My career spans from frontend to backend development, with experience in integrating AI technologies like OpenAI's GPT. Known for my natural leadership abilities, I excel in guiding teams towards professional growth and technological innovation.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive technology support for your business

consulting.title: Technology Consulting
consulting.description: I advise on technology selection, architecture, and digital product development strategy. Helping you make informed technical decisions.

estimation.title: Project Estimation
estimation.description: Professional IT project estimation — from MVP to complex systems. Detailed requirements analysis, time and cost estimation.

development.title: Fullstack Development
development.description: Design and build scalable web applications. React, Node.js, TypeScript — from concept to production.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Integration of AI solutions (OpenAI GPT) with web applications. Chatbots, process automation, intelligent systems.
